concerns.text: The plan relies on the Crystallography Open Database (COD) as the primary data source, but COD is not listed among the project's verified datasets. Constitution Principle II (Verified Accuracy) requires that every external dataset be verified; using an unverified source violates this requirement.

The Bondi van der Waals radii are used to compute atomic volumes, yet no citation or verified source is provided for these radii. Constitution Principle II mandates a verifiable reference for all external data resources.
